My Review: this sequel was so boring lol. pretty much the same plot as the first book but a lot less thought out and bland. there was barely any connection to the first book which is pretty important to me in a series and so many events just came out of nowhere ??? literally made zero sense to me and was pretty disappointed because i thought the first book was a fun read.
